title: The menu
intro: Prices include everything but the napkins you'll need. Dine-in, San Jose.

burgers.name: The Classic
burgers.desc: Double flame-grilled patties, American cheese, lettuce, tomato, house sauce, toasted brioche.

burgers.name: Bacon Stack
burgers.desc: Double patty, candied bacon, smoked cheddar, crispy onions, BBQ aioli.

burgers.name: Spicy Inferno
burgers.desc: Pepper jack, jalapeños, chipotle mayo, and a patty that bites back.

burgers.name: Mushroom Swiss
burgers.desc: Wild mushrooms, melted Swiss, garlic aioli, caramelized onions.

burgers.name: Crispy Chicken
burgers.desc: Buttermilk-fried chicken, pickles, slaw, and honey-hot drizzle.

burgers.name: The Garden
burgers.desc: Char-grilled plant patty, avocado, lettuce, tomato, vegan aioli.

desserts.name: Brownie Sundae
desserts.desc: Warm brownie, vanilla ice cream, caramel, candied pecans.
